content:
Task
Complete the task in Galaxy using the provided files.
- Objective: I need to perform a genome annotation of the samples I got and evaluate the quality of the annotation. The inputs that I have are FASTA files for genome, protein and some auxiliary datasets to perfrom the analysis. All files are in the benchmark/datasets/local/core_genome_annotation_001 directory. Run the tools in Galaxy necessary to achieve the two goals setted.

Attachments
- S_pombe_chrIII_genome.fasta (genome; fasta)
- S_pombe_trinity_assembly.fasta (assembly; fasta)
- Swissprot_no_S_pombe.fasta (protein_reference; fasta)
- snap_training.snaphmm (snap_model; snaphmm)
- augustus_training.tar.gz.augustus (augustus_model; augustus)

Suggested Galaxy Resources
- Galaxy instance: https://usegalaxy.org/
- Focus hint: genome annotation
- Focus hint: annotation quality evaluation

Requirements
- Use only the listed inputs and Galaxy-native resources relevant to the task.
- Adapt any retrieved tutorial or workflow to the current inputs instead of copying it blindly.
- Work step by step in Galaxy and state the main tool or workflow choice.
- Name the main parameters you set and explain any non-default setting.
- If a run fails, inspect the failure and retry only with a justified fix.

Return
- `annotation_quality_tool`: Retrieve what was tool used for evaluation of the annotation quality.
- `workflow_step_count`: Count the number of tools used in the pipeline.
- `visualization_tool`: Retrieve what was tool used for visualization of the results
